short_reason: Excellent article with strong title match to keyword and comprehensive coverage of OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code + PKCE. The PKCE explanation, token storage recommendations, and JWT validation sections are all technically solid and well-structured. The article earns high marks for title_naturalness (keyword-rich but reads naturally), keyword_usage, and factual_accuracy. Recommend minor polish only.
red_flags: The introduction paragraph is somewhat generic — a specific OAuth breach stat or example would strengthen the opening hook
The article lacks bolded keywords for SEO enhancement in the body text
No code implementation examples for PKCE flow — a concrete code walkthrough would significantly elevate practical utility
The refresh token rotation section is comparatively brief and could benefit from a sequential example
